generated_oml:
instance HokuyoUST10LXLiDAR : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Hokuyo UST-10LX LiDAR for environmental mapping"
    DTDFVocab:producedData LiDARPointCloudDataTransmitted
]

instance IntelDeepsenseD435iDepthCamera : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Intel Deepsense D435i Depth Camera for depth and visual data collection"
    DTDFVocab:producedData DepthVisualDataTransmitted
]

instance LiDARPointCloudDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom HokuyoUST10LXLiDAR
]

instance DepthVisualDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom IntelDeepsenseD435iDepthCamera
]

instance ClusteredPointCloudData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Clustered and tracked LiDAR point cloud data after preprocessing"
    DTDFVocab:fromData LiDARPointCloudDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo Python38
]

instance SerializedData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Serialized data after alignment of message types and unit conversions"
    DTDFVocab:fromData ClusteredPointCloudData
    DTDFVocab:inputTo ROS2Middleware
]

instance Jetpack5SDK : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "NVIDIA Jetpack 5.0 SDK development environment"
    DTDFVocab:enables DataMonitoringService, ComputationOffloadingService, RemoteManagementService
]

instance ROS2Middleware : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Robot Operating System 2 (ROS2) middleware for communication between components"
    DTDFVocab:enables DataMonitoringService, ComputationOffloadingService, RemoteManagementService
]

instance Python38 : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Python 3.8 application modules for simulation and control logic"
    DTDFVocab:enables DataMonitoringService, ComputationOffloadingService
]

instance Cpp : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "C++ application modules for simulation and control logic"
    DTDFVocab:enables ComputationOffloadingService
]

instance MATLABSimulink : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "MATLAB/Simulink for simulation and control logic"
    DTDFVocab:enables ComputationOffloadingService
]

instance DataMonitoringService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Real-time visualization of vehicle state data, projected driving path, detected object tracks, and data saving/report generation capabilities"
    DTDFVocab:provides VisualizationInsight, DataSavingAction, ReportGenerationAction
]

instance ComputationOffloadingService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Offloading of lead vehicle detection, speed computation based on distance, and actuation commands from vehicle's resource-constrained ECU to cloud infrastructure"
    DTDFVocab:provides LeadVehicleDetection, SpeedComputation, ActuationCommandAction
]

instance RemoteManagementService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Remote enable/disable ACC, set desired speed, and issue emergency braking commands via user interface"
    DTDFVocab:provides EnableACCAction, DisableACCAction, SetDesiredSpeedAction, EmergencyBrakingAction
]

instance VisualizationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Real-time visualization of vehicle state data, projected driving path, and detected object tracks"
]

instance LeadVehicleDetection : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Detection of lead vehicle using sensor data"
]

instance SpeedComputation : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Speed computation based on distance to lead vehicle"
]

instance DataSavingAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Data saving capability for monitoring and debugging"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic false
]

instance ReportGenerationAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Report generation for system performance and diagnostics"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic false
]

instance ActuationCommandAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Actuation commands for motor and steering control"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance EnableACCAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Enable ACC functionality remotely"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic false
]

instance DisableACCAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Disable ACC functionality remotely"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic false
]

instance SetDesiredSpeedAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Set desired speed via remote interface"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic false
]

instance EmergencyBrakingAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Emergency braking command issued by operator"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic false
]

instance VedderElectronicSpeedController : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Vedder Electronic Speed Controller for converting desired speed into motor voltage commands"
]

instance SteeringServo : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Steering servo for vehicle direction control"
]

instance PhysicalTwinEntity : DTDFVocab:Environment [
    base:contains DataCollectingFE, DataPreprocessingFE, PointCloudClusteringTrackingSW, HokuyoUST10LXLiDAR, IntelDeepsenseD435iDepthCamera, VedderElectronicSpeedController, SteeringServo
]

instance DigitalTwinEntity : DTDFVocab:Environment [
    base:contains DataTranslation, ComputationOffloadingComponent
]

instance UserEntity : DTDFVocab:Environment [
    base:contains ThreeDVisualization, ControlPanel
]

instance DataCollectingFE : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Functional Entity for collecting sensor data from physical vehicle"
]

instance DataPreprocessingFE : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Functional Entity for preprocessing sensor data including Point Cloud Clustering & Tracking"
]

instance PointCloudClusteringTrackingSW : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Software component for clustering and tracking LiDAR point clouds"
]

instance DataTranslation : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Component for serializing data, aligning message types, and unit conversions"
]

instance ComputationOffloadingComponent : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Component handling computation offloading tasks for ACC system"
]

instance ThreeDVisualization : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "3D Visualization subcomponent of User Interface FE"
]

instance ControlPanel : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Control Panel subcomponent of User Interface FE"
]

instance virtual_to_physical_interaction : DTDFVocab:VirtualToPhysical [
    base:desc "Control commands including enabling/disabling ACC, modifying desired speed, and emergency braking are processed by the Controlling FE. These commands are serialized and converted via the Data Translation component before being transmitted over Wi-Fi network to the Actuation FE, which converts desired speed into motor voltage commands for physical actuation. Feedback from actuation is monitored through the Data Monitoring service."
]

instance twinning_time_scale : DTDFVocab:TimeScale [
    base:desc "The system requires 100 ms clock synchronization accuracy for computation offloading between devices in safety-critical vehicular applications, as mandated by industry standards but constrained by hardware limitations."
]

instance dt_constellation : DTDFVocab:Constellation [
    base:desc "The architecture follows ISO 23247 RA, with software components mapped to Functional Entities (FEs) implemented as ROS2 packages. Each FE is deployed as individual ROS2 nodes across three hardware-based entities (Physical Twin, Digital Twin, User), enabling system-wide coordination through ROS2 communication. The Physical Twin Entity's design deviates from ISO 23247 by including general automotive functionality like Point Cloud Clustering & Tracking, while the User Entity's interface is split into visualization and control panel components."
]

instance dt_technical_connection : DTDFVocab:TechnicalConnection [
    base:desc "Communication between software components occurs within a ROS2 network. Inter-entity communication is conducted over a Wi-Fi network using UDP in the transport layer. The architecture supports real-time data transfer with ROS2 for intra-component communication and UDP-based Wi-Fi for inter-entity communication."
]

instance standardization : DTDFVocab:Standardization [
    base:desc "Compliance with ISO 23247:2021, which includes four parts covering overview, reference architecture (Part 2), digital representation of physical elements (Part 3), and information exchange (Part 4). The reference architecture defines an entity-based structure with Observable Manufacturing Elements (OMEs), Data Collection and Device Control Entities, Digital Twin Entities, and User Entities. Functional Entities (FEs) within these entities handle tasks like actuation, data transformation into human-interpretable formats, and user interfacing. OPC Unified Architecture (OPC UA) is referenced as an example protocol for data collection and device control."
]
